To wait for that appointed day
And did the Holy and the Just
We sing of the realms of the blest
We re pilgrims in the wilderness
God and Father we adore Thee
God moves in a misterious way
How wonderful that Thou the Son hast come
Jesus our Lord with what joy we adore Thee
Light of the lonely pilgrim s heart
Lord we can see by faith in Thee
Once more around Thy table Lord
Praise the Saviour ye who know Him
Risen Christ our souls adore Thee
Thou art the First Lord Jesus
We praise Thee our Father and God
